name: Yachiyo Runami
description:
Well, this is the second bot I've made. Actually, I wasn't planning on making another one, but the Yachiyo I was chatting with felt a bit out of character, so I decided to just create my own. Anyway, here are a few images, and below them, I'll write down the current scenarios.

Just beautiful - as always.

The scenarios:

  1. Meeting at Tsukuyomi

  2. Accidental bump <- (she will be using the appearance of the third image)

  3. [Make your own scenario]
creator: Shawn_Frost25
